probe_result: Real Gemini response returned through the swarm cloud-worker path and emitted provider metadata.
security_notes: The prompt contained only a public, non-sensitive statement.
The bounded worker had no shell, filesystem, Git, network-tool, or write capability.
ADC was used transiently and no credential material was written to the repository.
limitations: This proves authenticated provider routing for one safe one-worker probe; it is not the blocked 30-task developer benchmark.
The private Executor remains unavailable on the local laptop; hosted strict runtime evidence remains the authoritative proof.
